- Blue bar in the lower middle
- Magenta and charcoal blocks at the bottom right
- Green timer bar at the bottom
- Light gray bar at the very top
This is quite different from Level 1. Let me inspect the segmentation to understand the layout.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Level 2 - inspect the board
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print(f"Level: {current_frame.level}, Step: {current_frame.step}")
print(f"Shape: {current_frame.shape}")
print(f"\nNodes ({len(seg['nodes'])}):")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    print(f"  {n['color']}: id={n['id']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check adjacency
print(f"\nAdjacency list:")
for a, b in seg['adjacency_list']:
    c1 = seg['nodes'][a]['color']
    c2 = seg['nodes'][b]['color']
    print(f"  {c1}({a}) - {c2}({b})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
